derived.causal_summary: Realigns the vitest test layer to the post-isolation source layout. Three operations: MOVE 9 deep-loop unit tests + up-to-9 coverage-graph integration tests + 4 review-depth fixtures from .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/ into .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/tests/{unit,integration}/ with import-path rewrites; DELETE MCP-handler tests that asserted on the 4 removed deep_loop_graph_* tool IDs and the corresponding tool-registration tests; CREATE 4 direct-invocation integration tests (convergence/upsert/query/status-script.vitest.ts) using a shared tests/_helpers/spawn-cjs.ts helper plus 1 lifecycle test (db-open-close.vitest.ts) on a temp DB. P0 gates: pnpm vitest run exit 0 and zero matches for orphan imports of removed code paths plus zero matches for removed-tool references in MCP-handler test folders.
